title: Advanced Archery
description: A variety of custom Arrows and Bow enchantments
body:
This datapack adds nine new archery enchantments, and recipes for six custom arrows, to Minecraft 1.21.11!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8R6cYlh14Ao" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Enchantments
## Precision I-III
**Obtained by Enchanting/Trading.**
Each level of Precision reduces the amount of randomness applied to arrows when fired. At Precision III, all randomness is removed entirely!
## Guiding
**Obtained by Enchanting/Trading.**
After being fired, guiding arrows will veer in the direction their owner is looking.
## Scrying
**Obtained from End City chests.**
If a player has an Eye of Ender in their inventory, it will be consumed on firing a scrying bow, allowing them to follow along with the arrow as a spectator. A mannequin is left behind in their place, and if it takes any damage it will be transferred to the owner and they will be immediately returned.
## Ricochet I-V
**Obtained by Enchanting/Trading.**
Each level of Ricochet allows an arrow to bounce off of walls or blocks one additional time before coming to a stop.
## Hydrodynamic
**Obtained from Buried Treasure chests.**
Hydrodynamic bows fire arrows that are not slowed down as much in water.
## Subtle
**Obtained from Ancient City chests.**
Subtle bows do not produce sound when hitting blocks, keeping them from alerting Wardens of Sculk sensors. Additionally, arrows fired from Subtle bows do not proc aggro or cause player deaths to be attributed to the owner.
## Shulking I-III
**Obtained from End City chests.**
Each level of Shulking allows arrows to fly for 1 second without gravity.
## Phototropic
**Obtained as Hero of the Village reward.**
Phototropic arrows will home in on entities with the Glowing effect.
## Repeating I-III
**Obtained by Enchanting/Trading.**
Each level of Repeating will fire an additional arrow behind the first after a 10 tick delay.
## Phasing I-III
**Obtained from End City chests.**
Each level of Phasing will allow arrows to travel through a single layer of solid blocks.

# Arrows
## Bouncy Arrow
**Crafted with 8 Arrows around a Slime Ball**  
![Bouncy Arrow Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32e77896b2b467f1067a30a313e124e2e2e7793f.png)  
An arrow with the Ricochet III effect when fired from any bow or crossbow.
## Prismarine Arrow
**Crafted with a Prismarine Shard, a Stick, and a Feather**  
![Prismarine Arrow Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84ef3c9f8316d5556afc864ea9aabee96502b1f6.png)  
An arrow with the Hydrodynamic effect when fired from any bow or crossbow.
## Silent Arrow
**Crafted with 8 Arrows around an Echo Shard**  
![Silent Arrow Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/981b52ab13f59ff261a6131e1f3b7419cf590e28.png)  
An arrow with the Subtle effect when fired from any bow or crossbow.
## Floaty Arrow
**Crafted with 8 Arrows around a Popped Chorus Fruit**  
![Floaty Arrow Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0a0bf7fca0c42662ac19a077b07e5c8e2a4f8df.png)  
An arrow with the Shulking I effect when fired from any bow or crossbow.
## Phantom Arrow
**Crafted with a Phantom Membrane, a Stick, and a Flint**  
![Phantom Arrow Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34699143ea8e4d48b46bf55b270bbdaaefc46b3a.png)   
An arrow with the Phasing II effect when fired from any bow or crossbow.~~~~
## Ender Arrow
**Crafted with 4 Arrows around 5 Ender Pearls**  
![Ender Arrow Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/158bf424bf22cd3b9b6f9e3c76a8c01b5f1558dd.png)  
An arrow that teleports the owner wherever it land.
Not recommended for use with Repeating XD
